Containers.Name: Compose Manager Plus
Containers.Overview:
Fully integrated web UI for managing Docker Compose stacks on unRAID.
Adds Docker Compose and a native web UI for managing Compose stacks from the unRAID interface. Core features include creating and editing stacks, environment-variable templates, per-stack start/stop/recreate controls, log viewing, and import/export of stack definitions. See the repository for documentation and to report issues: https://github.com/mstrhakr/compose_plugin/issues
